items.claim: Cody Gibson is taking this fight on short notice.
items.quote: Cody Gibson did come in at on short notice in this fight.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has explosive hand speed, knockout power, a dangerous submission game, and is an aggressive combination striker.
items.quote: Abdul Hussein for those who don't know, explosive hand speed, real knockout power, dangerous submission game, and definitely an aggressive combination striker

items.claim: Cody Gibson has a good wrestling background and is taller with a reach advantage.
items.quote: good wrestling uh background, and definitely a vet in the game. Um, in this fight, guys, he is a lot taller than um Abdul Hussein, Cody Gibson, that is, but none of that's going to matter. He does have a reach advantage

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has notable wins over fighters like Tyson Nam.
items.quote: Abdul Hussein, who has notable wins um over guys like Tyson Nam.

items.claim: Nurulo Aliev is an outstanding chain wrestler with good top control, excellent cardio, and solid defensive discipline.
items.quote: Nulo, um, outstanding chain wrestler, uh, good top control, excellent cardio, and definitely discipline uh, defensively.

items.claim: Mike Davis has excellent boxing skills, speed, power, dangerous kicks, and athleticism.
items.quote: Mike Davis has excellent boxing skills, uh, pretty fast, pretty powerful, dangerous kicks, and definitely athletic.

items.claim: Magomed Gadzhiyev has great striking, power in his hands, and likes to keep the fight standing with pressure.
items.quote: likes to strike and um likes to keep the fight a stand and bang and puts pressure into his opponent.

items.claim: Magomed Gadzhiyev has a professional record of 6-0 and is very inexperienced.
items.quote: Mamed is only 6 and0 so very inexperienced.
